About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Redefining the Future of Style
About.description: We believe that fashion and technology should go hand in hand. Our mission is to provide a curated selection of premium products that inspire confidence and empower your lifestyle.
About.storyText: Founded in 2026, NextShop has quickly grown from a small dream to a global destination for trendsetters and tech enthusiasts alike. We pride ourselves on our commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction.

values.title: Our Values
values.qualityDesc: We never compromise on the quality of our products.
values.innovationDesc: Constantly pushing boundaries in style and tech.
values.customerDesc: Your satisfaction is our ultimate goal.
